_note: Clean steady-state memory footprints (MiB) measured on the Snapdragon X Elite laptop, summed over the resident llama-server (model weights + KV cache) and the pipeline process, after an 8-query warm-up with a freshly restarted server. These replace the per-query peak_rss values from the long production run, whose Windows working-set accounting drifted upward (memory-mapped GGUF pages + KV growth over ~800 queries) and did not reflect a representative deployment footprint. Measurement: PowerShell Get-Process WorkingSet64.
c3_note: C3 (k=10) server WS measurement timed out during the clean re-probe; value estimated from KV-cache scaling relative to the k=3/k=5 configs. Flagged as estimate.
